codeReview.summary: Reviewed both the original feature diff (947e572) and fix diff (569c03c) against the prior blocking findings. The fix fully resolves both blockers: validate() now errors when llama-server profiles exist with an empty llama_server path, and resolve_vllm_command_line() now includes docker_image as the first command element, with tests updated/added to enforce both behaviors.
